testcase.name: test_get_settings
testcase.error: tests/test_trading_bot.py:249: in auth_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_logs
testcase.error: tests/test_trading_bot.py:282: in auth_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_top_pairs
testcase.error: tests/test_trading_bot.py:307: in auth_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
